logistics/performance/v1

Pack IRI: https://schema.ion.id/logistics/performance/v1#  |  Layer: L5 — Logistics sector  |  Version: v1

context.jsonld attributes.yaml vocab.jsonld

Schemas in this pack

LogisticsPerformanceAttributes

IRI: https://schema.ion.id/logistics/performance/v1#LogisticsPerformanceAttributes

PropertyMandatoryDescription
awbNumberconditionalAir waybill or tracking number for parcel services
bookingReferenceconditionalBooking reference for hyperlocal services (replaces AWB)
billOfLadingReferenceconditionalBill of lading reference for freight
ticketReferenceconditionalBoarding ticket reference for Ro-Ro
storageContractReferenceconditionalWarehouse storage reference number
awbAllocationModeconditionalWhich AWB allocation mode was used for this shipment
preAllocatedAwbBlockRefconditionalReference to the pre-allocated AWB block (BAP_PRE_ALLOCATED mode)
pickupModelconditionalWhich pickup model BAP chose at /init
requestedPickupDateconditionalRequested pickup date (SCHEDULED_WINDOW, DAILY_PICKUP)
requestedPickupWindowconditional
confirmedPickupDateconditional
confirmedPickupWindowconditional
pickupBatchIdconditionalGroups multiple shipments under one bulk pickup trip. All shipments sharing the same pickupBatchId are collected by the
pickupBatchShipmentCountconditionalTotal shipments in this pickup batch (informational)
pickupAgentPointIdconditionalAgent point ID where DROP_OFF_AT_COUNTER was lodged
pickupLodgementTimestampconditionalWhen consignor dropped shipment at the agent point / locker
appliedCutoffsconditionalPer-shipment resolved cut-off deadlines (absolute timestamps). Each entry is one cut-off resolved from the offer's cutof
shippingLabelUrlconditional
shippingLabelFormatconditional
shippingLabelBytesconditionalBase64-encoded raw label bytes for ZPL/EPL direct printing
routingTopologyoptionalConfirmed routing topology for this shipment
estimatedTAToptionalEstimated time from pickup to delivery
estimatedDeliveryTimeoptional
scheduledDepartureconditional
scheduledArrivaloptional
pickupTimestampoptional
deliveryTimestampoptional
proofOfPickupTypeoptional
proofOfPickupoptional
proofOfDeliveryTypeoptional
proofOfDeliveryoptional
deliveryOtpconditional
trackingUrloptional
liveGpsoptionalReal-time GPS for LOG-HYPERLOCAL
lastScanTimestampoptional
lastScanLocationoptional
agentDetailsoptionalRider or agent identity. Exposed per agentAssignmentModel timing. Phone is always a proxy number.
hubIdoptionalHub identifier for hub-event on_status updates
legsconditionalPer-leg detail for multi-modal freight journeys. Each leg has its own carrier attribution, booking reference, and status
temperatureReadingoptional
coldChainIntegrityVerifiedoptionalTrue if temperature was within range throughout the journey
actualWeightoptionalWeight measured by LSP at pickup or hub (may trigger weight-dispute branch)
reservedCapacityoptional
reservationHoldUntiloptional
proposedDepartureoptional
requestedDepartureDateoptional
capacityConfirmedoptional
manifestVerifiedoptionalTrue when cargo manifest is verified at loading
loadingTimestampoptional
departureTimestampoptional
arrivalTimestampoptional
requestedSailingoptional
confirmedSailingoptional
boardingWindowoptional
boardingGateoptional
customsHoldReasonoptional
customsResolutionPathoptional
estimatedClearanceDurationoptional
attemptNumberoptional
ndrReasonCodeoptional
ndrTimestampoptional
attemptsRemainingoptional
buyerResolutionDeadlineoptional
valueAddedServicesSelectedoptional
expectedReceiptDateoptional
inboundReceiptTimestampoptional
receivedQuantitiesoptional
inboundDiscrepancyoptional
pickedSkusoptional
warehouseLocationAllocatedoptional
capacityAllocatedoptional
inboundInstructionsoptional
transportContractReferenceoptionalReference to the transport contract created when warehouse dispatches inventory on LOG-PARCEL, LOG-HYPERLOCAL, or LOG-FR
readyToShipconditionalTrue when the consignor / warehouse signals the shipment is packed, labelled, and ready for rider pickup.
readyToShipTimestampconditional
readyToShipByconditionalWhich party raised the RTS signal
rtsPickupTokenconditionalOpaque token included in the RTS signal that the rider must present at pickup (verified against what the warehouse/consi
parentWarehouseContractRefconditionalFor transport contracts spawned from a LOG-WAREHOUSE dispatch, reference to the parent warehouse contract. Used to trace
parentWarehouseCommitmentRefsconditionalSpecific commitment line IDs from the parent warehouse contract
dispatchOriginWarehouseBppIdconditionalION subscriber ID of the warehouse BPP originating this dispatch. Needed when warehouse BPP and transport BPP are differ
spawnedTransportContractRefsconditionalFor LOG-WAREHOUSE contracts, list of child transport contract IDs spawned from this storage contract. Populated as each
rtsNotificationRoutingconditionalRouting metadata when the RTS signal must cross BPP boundaries. Warehouse BPP emits /on_status[READY_FOR_PICKUP] on the
slaStatusoptional
currentStateTimingStatusconditionalReal-time timing status for the current performance state
stateTimingHistoryoptionalHistorical record of state dwell durations. Populated progressively as the performance moves through its state machine.
sustainabilityReportconditionalPer-shipment carbon and sustainability metrics. Required for enterprise shippers with CSRD/ISSB disclosure obligations (
hygieneProtocolAppliedoptional

Pack README

performance/v1 — Logistics Performance Attributes

Attaches to `beckn:Performance.performanceAttributes`.

What it covers

The execution record of the logistics contract. Every state transition adds fields to the performance object. The BAP reads this to track the shipment; the contract's performance history is the primary evidence trail for disputes.

Shipment identity by spine

SpineIdentity fieldIssued at
LOG-PARCEL`awbNumber``/on_confirm`
LOG-HYPERLOCAL`bookingReference``/on_confirm`
LOG-FREIGHT`billOfLadingReference``/on_confirm`
LOG-RORO`ticketReference``/on_confirm`
LOG-WAREHOUSE`storageContractReference``/on_confirm`

Tracking model — status vs track

**`/on_status` (pushed by BPP)** — point-in-time state transitions. Every state change pushes an unsolicited `on_status`. BAPs receive these without polling.

**`/track` → `/on_track`** — real-time streaming handle. BAP requests a tracking URL or WebSocket endpoint. For LOG-HYPERLOCAL, this streams live GPS coordinates. For LOG-PARCEL, it returns the AWB tracking URL that the carrier's website serves.

These are complementary: `on_status` for state machine events, `track/on_track` for continuous real-time position.

Routing topology

For LOG-PARCEL, `routingTopology` is set in `/on_select` and confirmed in `/on_confirm`:

  • `P2P` — direct pickup to delivery; no hub states in the state machine
  • `P2H2P` — single hub; AT_ORIGIN_HUB and AT_DESTINATION_HUB states fire
  • `P2H2H2P` — both hubs with inter-hub transit; SORTED_AT_ORIGIN, IN_TRANSIT_INTERHUB, SORTED_AT_DESTINATION states fire

    • Proof of pickup and delivery

    Both types (pickup and delivery) must be declared at `/on_confirm` via `proofOfPickupType` and `proofOfDeliveryType`:

    TypeWhat it means
    `OTP`One-time password generated at booking; buyer shares with rider at delivery
    `PHOTO`Photo captured at pickup/delivery location with timestamp and GPS
    `SIGNATURE`Digital or physical signature captured
    `BIOMETRIC`Fingerprint or face recognition (uncommon, enterprise)
    `NONE`No proof required (documents, some B2B)

    For cold chain, temperature reading is required alongside the proof at both pickup and delivery.

    Agent/rider details

    For LOG-HYPERLOCAL, `agentDetails` carries: rider name, phone via proxy (never the real number), vehicle type, vehicle plate, and photo URL. When this is exposed depends on `offer.agentAssignmentModel`:

    ModelagentDetails exposed at
    PRE_ASSIGNED`on_status[RIDER_ASSIGNED]`
    DEDICATED_FLEET`on_status[BOOKING_CONFIRMED]`
    POOL_ASSIGNED`on_status[RIDER_EN_ROUTE_TO_PICKUP]`
    FIFO_AT_PICKUP`on_status[PICKED_UP]` — only when rider takes the order

    Cold chain fields

    ```yaml

    temperatureReading:

    value: 4.2

    unit: celsius

    timestamp: "2026-04-22T10:15:00Z"

    location: "Pickup — Jl. Sudirman 45"

    deviceId: "DEVICE-COLDCHAIN-001"

    excursionDetected: false

    coldChainIntegrityVerified: true

    ```

    These fire in `on_status[PICKED_UP]` and `on_status[DELIVERED]` when cold chain is declared on the resource. If `coldChainIntegrityVerified = false` at delivery, the damage-claim branch is immediately eligible.

    Weight discrepancy fields

    ```yaml

    actualWeight:

    value: 3.2 # declared was 2.5kg — 28% over

    unit: kilogram

    measuredAt: ORIGIN_HUB # PICKUP | ORIGIN_HUB | DESTINATION_HUB

    measurementTimestamp: "2026-04-22T14:30:00Z"

    ```

    If actual weight exceeds declared by more than the `offer.weightDisputePolicy` tolerance, BPP raises the weight-dispute branch via `/on_update`.

    Attempt management

    ```yaml

    attemptNumber: 2

    ndrReasonCode: "NDR-001" # Consignee not available

    ndrTimestamp: "2026-04-23T11:00Z"

    attemptsRemaining: 1

    buyerResolutionDeadline: "2026-04-23T23:59Z"

    ```

    After DELIVERY_ATTEMPT_FAILED, the attempts branch opens. BAP has until `buyerResolutionDeadline` to reschedule, change address, or switch to self-pickup.

    Capacity reservation (LOG-FREIGHT)

    ```yaml

    reservedCapacity:

    quantity: 1

    unit: container_20ft

    reservationToken: "CAP-RES-20260422-001"

    reservationHoldUntil: "2026-04-22T10:45:00Z"

    proposedDeparture: "2026-04-25T08:00:00Z"

    capacityConfirmed: true

    ```

    Returned in `/on_select` for freight. If BAP does not reach `/confirm` before `reservationHoldUntil`, capacity is released.

    SLA status

    ```yaml

    slaStatus: ON_TIME # ON_TIME | AT_RISK | BREACHED

    ```

    BPP optionally includes this in `on_status` updates when monitoring against `offer.slaPolicy`. If `BREACHED`, reconcile step will carry `slaRebateAmount` per the policy formula.

    Part of schema.ion.id — ION Network vocabulary. Built from schema/extensions/logistics/performance/v1/ in the ion-network spec. Generated 2026-04-24 19:01 UTC.
